perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A woman in a grey beanie and a grey-and-black top holds up small paper bags with Disney characters and chocolate themes. (2) She points to a selection of cards on a wooden floor representing different bags. (3) A second woman in a grey coat stands in front of a pink brick wall with a Chiikawa poster, holding a large black bag filled with plushies. (4) Close-up shots show various Chiikawa-themed plush toys, stickers, and cards being arranged. (5) The second woman sits indoors behind a table filled with the items, gesturing with her hands while smiling. (6) The video ends with a montage of the items on display.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) A high-pitched, excited female voice introduces different bag styles with upbeat, fast-paced synth-pop music. (2) Sound effects like 'pop' and 'ting' occur as items are presented. (3) The second woman's voice is heard describing her haul at the exhibition, maintaining a cheerful and energetic tone. (4) The BGM remains consistent throughout with electronic beats and cute melody loops. (5) A final sound effect accompanies the display of the total price.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: 'Chocolate', 'Minnie', 'Donald Duck' identifying bag styles. (2) Hook Text: 'Which one will she pick?' (3) Title/Hook: 'Magic Chiikawa - Stuffing your bag to the max'. (4) Decorative Text: 'Sister came to the Chiikawa exhibition', 'Whatever she fits in, I'll pay'. (5) Functional Text: 'Total is 3,550 yuan' in large orange font. (6) Emotional stickers and emojis appear throughout.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Choice Challenge -> Exhibition Shopping -> Haul Reveal -> Price Summary

visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: The first woman wears a grey knit beanie and a unique grey/black bow-detail top. The second woman wears a grey coat and later a black top.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: An indoor room with a leather couch and art on the wall; a brick wall with a pink Chiikawa exhibition poster; a wooden floor.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Bright studio lighting indoors and natural daylight outdoors.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Shopping Challenge -> Result Reveal
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To document a fun shopping trip and 'challenge' where the creator pays for her sister's haul at a popular character exhibition, showcasing the merchandise and total cost to engage viewers interested in cute collectibles.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The entire video focuses on showing the merchandise from the Chiikawa exhibition and mentions the location and pricing.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Heavy use of variety-show style text bubbles and fast-paced 'haul' style editing.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video leverages the current popularity of Chiikawa merchandise in East Asia to generate interest.
